prompt: In Terminal, run 'brew list' and write the output to ~/Desktop/kinbench/291-brew-list.txt. If brew is not installed, write 'brew not installed' to that file. Fast path: cerebellum 'terminal run "mkdir -p ~/Desktop/kinbench && (command -v brew >/dev/null 2>&1 && brew list || echo brew not installed) > ~/Desktop/kinbench/291-brew-list.txt"'.
